generated_oml:
instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container maintaining thermal environment for incubator"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element controlling internal temperature of incubator"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cooling fan regulating internal temperature via air circulation"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi hardware controller managing sensor data acquisition and actuator control"
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor measuring heatbed environment temperature inside the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempData1Transmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor measuring heatbed environment temperature inside the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempData2Transmitted
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor measuring ambient environment temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTempData1Transmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalTempData2Transmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance ExternalTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTempData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature measurement from sensor 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempData1Transmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModel2Param, ThermalModel4Param, CalibrationEnabler
]

instance InternalTempData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature measurement from sensor 2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempData2Transmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModel2Param, ThermalModel4Param, CalibrationEnabler
]

instance ExternalTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time external temperature measurement from ambient sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModel2Param, ThermalModel4Param, CalibrationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel2Param : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Two-parameter thermal model representing heatbed and environment thermal behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, PredictionEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel4Param : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Four-parameter thermal model representing heatbed and environment thermal behavior with higher accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, PredictionEnabler
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-based system for sensor data collection and transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm from INTO-CPS Association's example-incubator GitHub repository (https://github.com/INTO-CPS-Association/example-incubator) for adjusting thermal model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance PredictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine for thermal behavior prediction using calibrated thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring using sensor data from the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of thermal behavior for proactive adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of heating parameters using calibrated thermal models to maintain optimal temperature"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalHeatingParameterInsight, AdjustHeatbedPowerAction, AdjustFanSpeedAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection through analysis of sensor data and model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current temperature status of the incubator for real-time monitoring"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal behavior based on simulation models for proactive adjustments"
]

instance OptimalHeatingParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculated optimal heating parameters derived from model calibration"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of system faults or anomalies requiring intervention"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedPowerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of heatbed power based on model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of fan speed to regulate internal temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPiController
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation of simulation models was performed through experimental comparison, where the four-parameter model demonstrated higher fidelity in predicting thermal inertia of the heatbed compared to the two-parameter model; however, specific uncertainty quantification or error correction mechanisms are not detailed in the documents."
]
